title: Royalford 2 Tier Clothes Airer | Foldable Indoor Outdoor Clothes Drying Rack with 23 Bars| 27m Laundry Dryer Stand | Non-Slip Feet Space Saving Easy to Assemble Portable Clothes Dryer
features: ✅ 27M DRYING SPACE – Spacious 2 tier clothes airer offers up to 27 metres of drying area for large laundry loads. Ideal clothes drying rack for garments, towels, and delicates, ensuring fast air drying indoors or outdoors. Enjoy hassle-free drying every day.

✅ DURABLE IRON FRAME – Crafted from heavy-duty iron tubes (16mm, 12mm) and 2.5mm iron wires with a rust-resistant powder coating. Designed to last through daily use, this foldable drying rack ensures stability and strength in all weather conditions.

✅ SPACE-SAVING DESIGN – This indoor airer folds flat for compact storage when not in use. Perfect for small laundry areas, bathrooms, or balconies. Keep your home tidy while maximizing drying capacity with this portable dryer solution.

✅ NON-SLIP & STURDY SUPPORT – Equipped with anti-slip foot caps that protect your floors and keep your laundry rack stable during use. Designed for reliable drying, even with heavy clothes. Enjoy safe and steady performance every time.

✅ EASY TO ASSEMBLE & USE – Simple, tool-free setup makes it effortless to start drying clothes instantly. Lightweight yet durable, this portable clothes airer doubles as a convenient dryer rack for daily use at home or outdoors.
description: Simplify laundry days with the Royalford 2 Tier Clothes Airer, designed for maximum drying efficiency and durability. With a 27m drying capacity and sturdy, rust-resistant iron frame, it’s perfect for all types of clothing. The foldable, space-saving design makes it ideal for compact homes, while the non-slip feet ensure stability during use. Whether used as an indoor airer, laundry rack, or portable clothes airer, it offers a reliable, energy-efficient way to dry clothes naturally — saving space, time, and electricity. Spacious 27m Drying Area – Dries more clothes in one go, ideal for family laundry. 2-Tier Design – Maximises drying capacity without taking up extra space. Foldable & Compact – Easy to store in small spaces when not in use. Strong Iron Frame – Built with durable, rust-resistant coated tubes. All-Weather Use – Suitable for indoor and outdoor drying year-round. Stable & Non-Slip – Anti-slip foot caps keep it steady on any floor. Energy Saving – Air dries clothes naturally, cutting electricity costs. Gentle on Fabrics – Prevents shrinkage and maintains fabric quality. Lightweight & Portable – Easy to move between rooms or outside. Space-Saving Laundry Solution – Perfect for modern homes, flats, or balconies.
